title: lite's Fabricator
description: Item & Block Duplication, inspired by the 1.19 Shulker Dupe mod.
body:
# Fabricator
This mod introduces the Fabricator block, a block which, similarly to the infamous [1.19 Shulker Dupe mod](https://github.com/Coderx-Gamer/shulker-dupe/releases), allows players to dupe **blocks**, **items** and **storage blocks** too!
## Recipe
This one's pretty easy to craft, but with a twist - you have to get your hands on a **special** item!

![What kind of description does a plain crafting recipe need???](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fc6d80d5ec8481cc1b05156b013ef8df9f12f7c.png)

The mod, being inspired by the **Shulker Dupe** mod, keeps the same premise of having to achieve an important feat in order to gather all the required pieces. I thought it was a fun mechanic to keep.
## Usage
1. Create the Fabricator.
2. Place it down in a safe spot.
3. Fill one (or all) the storage slots with your desired material.
4. Click on the **Fabricate** button.
5. If done properly, the GUI should close, with your inventory having a double of the given itemstack.
## Information
For many, the access to unlimited resources is a controversial topic - Way too many people think of Minecraft as a game purely based on skill progression (achievements etc) and omit the *creative* aspect. They get bored easily, hence why all modern media portray Minecraft as this "two-week-phase" game while it really doesn't need to be that. Minecraft is about the love for creation and adventure, not *just* through thrilling experiences but also through passion and dedication, through time spent with friends on that one world you never leave. 

When the Shulker Dupe came out, my friends and I had the idea of running a shady trade company in our school SMP server. It was the most fun I ever had in Minecraft; planning out our system, building HQs in every dimension, thinking of crazy things we could implement to make people buy more from us. I have since lost contact with them, and others don't have time to dedicate into playing the game again. 

This mod is a love letter to these times. My friends were also the kind of people who wouldn't enjoy Minecraft without a linear progression, but they enjoyed themselves whenever it came to working on our faction.
## Credits
MinecraftLite - Development

My lovely wife - ♡
